div:
<#assign aDateTime=.now>
      <#assign aDateTime=aDateTime?string("MMMM dd, yyyy")>
	
${aDateTime}
	

      <#if customer.isperson=="T">
          Dear ${customer.salutation} ${customer.firstname} ${customer.middlename} ${customer.lastname},
          

      <#else>
          Dear ${customer.companyname},
          

      </#if>

    <#if invoicegroup??>
	    
This is just a friendly reminder that your account with us appears as past due. Our records indicate that you have a total outstanding balance of ${invoicegroup.amountdue} for the Invoice Group #${invoicegroup.invoicegroupnumber} with the following invoices overdue:
	    
    <#else>
        
This is just a friendly reminder that your account with us appears as past due. Our records indicate that you have a total outstanding balance of ${customer.overduebalance} with the following invoices overdue:
        
    </#if>
	
          <#if invoicelist?has_content>
            
	            

		            Invoice #
		            Description
		            Invoice Date
		            Due Date
		            Invoice Currency
		            Amount (Invoice Currency)
	            
                  <#list invoicelist as invoice>
                    <#if invoice.groupedto == "" || invoicegroup??>
                      

                        ${invoice.tranid}
                              <#if invoice.custbody_3805_dunning_procedure!="">*
                              </#if>
                        

                        ${invoice.memo}
                        ${invoice.trandate}
                        ${invoice.duedate}
                        ${invoice.currency}
                        ${invoice.fxamountremaining?string.number}

                      
                    </#if>
                </#list>
                    <#list invoicegrouplist as invoicegrouprecord>
                    

                    Invoice Group #${invoicegrouprecord.invoicegroupnumber}
                        <#if invoicegrouprecord.custrecord_dl_ig_dunning_procedure!="">*
                        </#if>
                    
                    
                    <#list invoicelist as invoice>
                    <#if invoice.groupedto == invoicegrouprecord.invoicegroupnumber>
                    

                    ${invoice.tranid}<#if invoice.custbody_3805_dunning_procedure != "">*</#if>
                    ${invoice.memo}
                    ${invoice.trandate}
                    ${invoice.duedate}
                    ${invoice.currency}
                    ${invoice.fxamountremaining?string.number}
                    
                </#if>
                </#list>
                </#list>

            
            <#if invoicegroup??>
            *A separate dunning letter may be sent for each marked invoice.
            <#else>
            *A separate dunning letter may be sent for each marked invoice/invoice group.
            </#if>

          <#elseif invoice??>
              

              
                

	                Invoice #
	                Description
	                Invoice Date
	                Due Date
	                Currency
	                Amount
                

                

	                ${invoice.tranid}
	                ${invoice.memo}
	                ${invoice.trandate}
	                ${invoice.duedate}
	                ${invoice.currency}
	                ${invoice.amountremaining}
                
              
          </#if>
	


	
We would much appreciate if you could let us know the status of this payment. Please do not hesitate to call us if you have any questions about the balance due on your account. If you have already sent us your payment, please disregard this reminder.
	
To access your NetSuite Customer Center account, please log in to https://${companyInformation.appDomain}/pages/customerlogin.jsp


	
Thank you very much for your attention to this matter and your continued business.
	
Sincerely,

		

          ${employee.salutation} ${employee.firstname} ${employee.middlename} ${employee.lastname}

          <#if companyInformation.legalname!="">
              ${companyInformation.legalname}

          <#else>
              ${companyInformation.companyname}

          </#if>
          ${companyInformation.phone}

          ${companyInformation.email}

          ${companyInformation.fax}
